title: Luffy Breaks Free Again
description: On pages 15–18, luffy breaks free again as miss Goldenweek turns Luffy’s emotions against him while Vivi, Nami, and Zoro remain trapped in Mr. 3’s deadly wax display.
scene: Luffy Breaks Free Again. Miss Goldenweek turns Luffy’s emotions against him while Vivi, Nami, and Zoro remain trapped in Mr. 3’s deadly wax display. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It's over for all of you! This is my ultimate ability...!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Kyahaha! What a moron! You missed and hit your own friend!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ah, I forgot to tell you... even my breath can explode.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Did you get a grip yet!?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Yeah, I did... thanks for that. I won't let those paintings affect me anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: You mean... that attack was actually to burn away the painting along with his shirt!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm not going to let even a single crewmate of mine die!

summary: This part centers on luffy breaks free again, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
